title: A Neural Network from Scratch with TensorFlow GradientTape
short_description: Train an MLP by hand in TensorFlow -- tf.Variable weights, your own matmuls, and manual gradient descent with tf.GradientTape and assign_sub. No Keras layers, no optimizer, no model.fit.
learning_objectives: Write a forward pass by hand with matrix multiplication and sigmoid
Record a computation with tf.GradientTape and get gradients via tape.gradient
Run gradient descent manually with Variable.assign_sub
Contrast eager GradientTape training with a PyTorch autograd loop
prerequisites: Challenge 4 (PyTorch autograd from scratch) -- this is the TensorFlow counterpart
